title: coreopsis flexicaulis
intro: Coreopsis flexicaulis, also known as drooping coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and drooping stems. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Coreopsis flexicaulis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as a natural antihistamine. Coreopsis flexicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
